requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) and TRA Type Approval for Wireless Functions
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容（EMC）及无线功能的TRA型号核准
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁兼容（EMC）及無線功能的TRA型號核准

summary.en: Bahrain does not use the EU CE marking. Electrical and electronic products, including power banks with electronic circuitry, must meet electromagnetic compatibility expectations through GSO-adopted EMC standards (the GSO transposition of CISPR / IEC EMC requirements) where the product is in a regulated scope, with conformity administered by BSMD under MOIC. Separately, any product with a wireless or radio function (for example a power bank with wireless Qi charging, Bluetooth, or any RF transmitter) requires type approval from the Telecommunications Regulatory Authority (TRA) of Bahrain before it can be imported and sold. TRA type approval covers the radio/RF aspects and is distinct from BSMD/GSO product safety and EMC conformity. The applicable mains environment is 230 V, 50 Hz for any associated charger.
summary.zh: 巴林不使用欧盟CE标志。电气电子产品（包括含电子电路的移动电源）在受监管范围内时，须通过GSO采纳的EMC标准（GSO对CISPR / IEC EMC要求的转化）满足电磁兼容预期，符合性由MOIC下属BSMD管理。另外，任何具有无线或射频功能的产品（例如带无线Qi充电、蓝牙或任何射频发射器的移动电源）在进口和销售前须取得巴林电信监管局（TRA）的型号核准。TRA型号核准涵盖无线/射频方面，与BSMD/GSO产品安全及EMC符合性相区分。任何配套充电器适用的市电环境为230伏、50赫兹。
summary.zht: 巴林不使用歐盟CE標誌。電氣電子產品（包括含電子電路的行動電源）在受監管範圍內時，須透過GSO採納的EMC標準（GSO對CISPR / IEC EMC要求的轉化）滿足電磁兼容預期，符合性由MOIC下屬BSMD管理。另外，任何具有無線或射頻功能的產品（例如帶無線Qi充電、藍牙或任何射頻發射器的行動電源）在進口和銷售前須取得巴林電信監管局（TRA）的型號核准。TRA型號核准涵蓋無線/射頻方面，與BSMD/GSO產品安全及EMC符合性相區分。任何配套充電器適用的市電環境為230伏、50赫茲。

standards_or_laws: GSO-adopted EMC standards (GSO transposition of CISPR / IEC 61000 series) — administered by BSMD/MOIC where in scope
Telecommunications Regulatory Authority (TRA) Bahrain — Type Approval for radio and telecommunications equipment
Bahrain Telecommunications Law (Legislative Decree No. 48 of 2002) and TRA type-approval regulations

summary.en: In China, EMC for electronic products is addressed through GB EMC standards (GB/T 9254, GB 17625 series, and equivalents), and for products in the CCC catalogue, EMC testing is part of the CCC certification. Wireless and radio functions are regulated separately: a Radio Transmission Equipment Type Approval Certificate (SRRC, 型号核准 / radio type approval) administered by MIIT is mandatory for radio transmitters sold or used in China. SRRC is the Chinese-side radio approval and is a domestic-market authorisation only; it is not recognised by Bahrain's TRA.
summary.zh: 在中国，电子产品的EMC通过GB EMC标准（GB/T 9254、GB 17625系列及等同标准）处理，列入CCC目录的产品其EMC检测属于CCC认证一部分。无线和射频功能单独监管：由工信部管理的无线电发射设备型号核准证（SRRC）对在中国销售或使用的无线电发射器为强制性。SRRC是中国侧无线电核准，仅为国内市场授权，不被巴林TRA认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，電子產品的EMC透過GB EMC標準（GB/T 9254、GB 17625系列及等同標準）處理，列入CCC目錄的產品其EMC檢測屬於CCC認證一部分。無線和射頻功能單獨監管：由工信部管理的無線電發射設備型號核准證（SRRC）對在中國銷售或使用的無線電發射器為強制性。SRRC是中國側無線電核准，僅為國內市場授權，不被巴林TRA認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254, GB 17625 series — China EMC standards (often within CCC for catalogued products)
SRRC — State Radio Regulation of China / MIIT Radio Transmission Equipment Type Approval (domestic radio authorisation only)

gap.en: Two distinct gaps arise. (1) EMC: Chinese GB EMC reports or CCC-embedded EMC are not recognised by BSMD; the exporter needs EMC evidence to the GSO-adopted standards where the product is in scope. (2) Wireless/radio: a Chinese SRRC certificate does not transfer to Bahrain. Any power bank with wireless charging, Bluetooth, or other RF must obtain TRA Bahrain type approval before import — a separate application, fees, and local-importer involvement, independent of the safety and EMC conformity handled by BSMD. Products with no radio function do not need TRA approval but still require EMC/safety conformity where in scope. There is no CE marking step; substituting an EU CE file does not satisfy BSMD/GSO or TRA.
gap.zh: 出现两项不同差距。（1）EMC：中国GB EMC报告或CCC内嵌EMC不被BSMD认可；产品在范围内时，出口商需要符合GSO采纳标准的EMC证据。（2）无线/射频：中国SRRC证书不可转用于巴林。任何带无线充电、蓝牙或其他射频的移动电源在进口前须取得TRA巴林型号核准——独立的申请、费用及本地进口商参与，与BSMD处理的安全及EMC符合性相分离。无射频功能的产品无需TRA核准，但在范围内时仍须EMC/安全符合性。不存在CE标志步骤；以欧盟CE文件替代无法满足BSMD/GSO或TRA。
gap.zht: 出現兩項不同差距。（1）EMC：中國GB EMC報告或CCC內嵌EMC不被BSMD認可；產品在範圍內時，出口商需要符合GSO採納標準的EMC證據。（2）無線/射頻：中國SRRC證書不可轉用於巴林。任何帶無線充電、藍牙或其他射頻的行動電源在進口前須取得TRA巴林型號核准——獨立的申請、費用及本地進口商參與，與BSMD處理的安全及EMC符合性相分離。無射頻功能的產品無需TRA核准，但在範圍內時仍須EMC/安全符合性。不存在CE標誌步驟；以歐盟CE文件替代無法滿足BSMD/GSO或TRA。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where applicable — GSO-adopted EMC conformity via BSMD/MOIC for in-scope electronic products; TRA Bahrain type approval mandatory for any product with a radio/wireless function before import and sale; no EU CE marking is used
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory domestically — GB EMC standards (often within CCC) for catalogued products; SRRC mandatory for radio transmitters sold/used in China (domestic authorisation only)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bahrain does not use EU CE marking. A Chinese exporter must (1) provide EMC evidence to the GSO-adopted standards via BSMD/MOIC where the product is in scope, and (2) obtain TRA Bahrain type approval for any wireless/radio function (Qi charging, Bluetooth, RF). Chinese SRRC and GB EMC/CCC results do not transfer and do not substitute for these. Products without a radio function skip TRA approval but still need EMC/safety conformity where in scope. Confirm the exact EMC standard list and TRA application requirements with BSMD/MOIC and the TRA before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林不使用欧盟CE标志。中国出口商须：（1）在产品于范围内时，通过BSMD/MOIC提供符合GSO采纳标准的EMC证据；（2）为任何无线/射频功能（Qi充电、蓝牙、射频）取得TRA巴林型号核准。中国SRRC及GB EMC/CCC结果不可转用，亦不能替代上述要求。无射频功能的产品可免TRA核准，但在范围内时仍须EMC/安全符合性。发货前请向BSMD/MOIC及TRA确认具体EMC标准清单与TRA申请要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林不使用歐盟CE標誌。中國出口商須：（1）在產品於範圍內時，透過BSMD/MOIC提供符合GSO採納標準的EMC證據；（2）為任何無線/射頻功能（Qi充電、藍牙、射頻）取得TRA巴林型號核准。中國SRRC及GB EMC/CCC結果不可轉用，亦不能替代上述要求。無射頻功能的產品可免TRA核准，但在範圍內時仍須EMC/安全符合性。發貨前請向BSMD/MOIC及TRA確認具體EMC標準清單與TRA申請要求。

source.publisher: Telecommunications Regulatory Authority (TRA) — Kingdom of Bahrain
